Stunning. No notes.
I welcome our alien overlords.

They make a good meal <3

item.title: Thursday UNHINGED meme dump to help you get to the end of weekend #519
item.description:
1
2. When a girl touches my...
3
4. Going all in
5. Too true
6. What alternative can we use here?
7. "hey, do you wanna play brick?"
8. Hungry? yeah? Let's go
9. A standard day in Russia
10
11. Friendship with trust broken
12
13
14. "Call the fishes to war!"
15. Hopefully this video will take the bad vibes away! P.S. If you like the humor of this dump, please consider wishlisting my wacky Stanley Parable-inspired game on Steam. I think it might be for your: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: HA HA - Phil Ken Sebben Cosplay
item.description:
Fun look at my Phil Ken Sebben Cosplay from the "Droopy Botox" episode. I rewatch the Harvey Birdman serious about once a year :P Also, most valuable lesson learned on this cosplay... Use proper paint that doesn't melt against your skin, or your blue necklace leaves it's shadow behind on you for about a week after you take it off - and everyone at work is too confused to ask questions....
Reference image
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: I Want to Believe
item.description: These daily comics are really just a long-winded thank you. Because without you, the reader, all this effort would be just so much noise in the void. Extra gratitude goes to our patrons, the steadfast few who keep us grounded. If you’d like to join our community and support the cause, here’s your doorway: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Nemophila Harmony is a flower event in Hitachi Seaside Park in Japan. About 5 million baby blue-eyes flowers (nemophilas) bloom
item.dc:creator: Mysticciphers

item.title: Small World
item.description:
The human eye looks like a black hole by Suren Manvelyan
Matchstick igniting by the friction surface of the box by Ole Bielfeldt Technique: Brightfield, Image Stacking Magnification: 2.5x
Taenia solium (tapeworm) everted scolex by Teresa Zgoda Technique: Confocal Magnification: 200x
Fluorescent turtle embryo by Teresa Zgoda Teresa Kugler Technique: Stereomicroscopy, Fluorescence Magnification: 5x
Butterfly egg by Ye Fei Zhang Technique: Image Stacking Magnification: 10X
Butterfly proboscis by Jochen Schroeder Technique: Image Stacking Magnification: 6.3x
Venomous fangs of a small tarantula by John-Oliver Dum Technique: Image Stacking Magnification: 10x
Crystallized sugar syrup by Diego García Technique: Polarized Light Magnification: 25x
Unburned particles of carbon released when the hydrocarbon chain of candle wax breaks down by Ole Bielfeldt Technique: Brightfield, Image Stacking Magnification: 2.5x
Ant by Eugenijus Kavaliauskas Technique: Reflected Light Magnification: 5x
item.dc:creator: Nofakepotatoes

item.title: "That's one small step for man, one Great Leap Forward for mankind."
item.dc:creator: BlooPhyre

item.title: This is one of the best things I've read today
item.description: https://www.newsweek.com/north-korean-troops-deserting-ukraine-frontline-hours-after-arrival-report-1969726 If I were a North Korean citizen, I would be banging down the doors to volunteer to go fight with the Russian army, not because I'd actually be fighting, but because I would finally be able to escape North Korea, and then surrender to Ukrainian soldiers, and then be done with both North Korea and Russia in one fell swoop. This is great!
item.dc:creator: BonafideHomicide

item.title: Wait horned lizards do what!?!
item.description: Spooky fact: when Horned Lizards feel threatened they shoot blood from their eyes. Their blood is also toxic due to their diet of poisonous ants. Credit: NaturalHabitatShorts (instagram)
item.dc:creator: ExistentialDreadPirateRoberts

item.title: Weeping Angel Body paint - MCroft07
item.description:
I painted this on myself using a mirror (and brushes). Took around 6 hours. I did film a process video as well which was really fun on TikTok/IG if you wanted to see it :) I exist on the internet here: Instagram: www.instagram.com/mcroft07 Twitter: www.twitter.com/MCroft07 Tiktok: www.tiktok.com/@mcroft07 Twitch: www.twitch.tv/mcroft07
Extra photos because I was super proud of it! (I edited the teeth to match)
Extra photos because I was super proud of it!
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Why I can't wait for 1-click cancel
item.description: Marked mature for spicy language. Went to cancel my Sirius XM subscription (got an amazing year-long deal) and they forced me to chat with an AI bot in order to cancel the subscription. Fuck. That. Noise.
item.dc:creator: OohDaLolly

item.title: I didn't forget my 11th cake day!
item.description: Finally! I usually miss it. I remembered, here's some memes.
item.dc:creator: boneroni

item.title: So I work in a Bell Foundry...
item.description: So I work at a Bell Foundry, we cast bells and manufacture frames for them to hang from, for churches, temples and carillon all around the world. Anyone interested in knowing a little more? Feel free to ask. We also started a YouTube channel which is going quite well with collaborations planned Edit: For those asking the link is https://www.youtube.com/@johntaylorsbellfoundry
item.dc:creator: ThatBellGuy

item.title: lost my little brother.
item.description: i don’t really even know what to say. i’m not coping well and words are hard lately. his name is billy. he just turned 25 on august 6th. passed august 23rd. very sudden and very traumatic. he always introduces himself with “howdy, i’m bill factor” and a firm handshake. always greeted me with a “howdy, sis”. gave a hug that could make anything okay. i miss him so much it’s crippling. just wanted to share him with the world, maybe throw out a “howdy, bill” if you can. i don’t know what to do without him. best brother, best uncle to my children, best son to our mother, best human being i will ever know. i can’t fathom how life is just going on without him. the pain is so heavy. thank you for letting me word vomit. i am so sorry for anyone else that may be grieving. my heart is with you. i love you, brother.
item.dc:creator: adhdlatte

item.title: When help arrives just in time
item.description: Nicely done, innit ?

item.title: The largest moth in North America, The Cecropia Moth.
item.dc:creator: Exopeat

item.title: Muscle Memory Still Works After 10 Years
item.description: Update: Coworker came back with 6 stitches. Went home in good spirits. Luckily my foreman and I were standing nearby when it happened but my foreman kind of froze as I was taking action. The first responder thought that I must have been practicing for when he switches shifts. Don't know how many stitches he is getting as he is currently in the ER. Wasn't in any pain in the moment but there was a good amount of blood.
item.dc:creator: stormNoodleMagnet
